title: Scrum Master

rationales.taskAutomation: Sprint metrics, burndown and velocity charts, and retro data aggregation are now fully AI-generated from tool telemetry, but facilitating a team through conflict and building trust in the room is not something AI performs.
rationales.toolMaturity: Native AI reporting is now standard in Jira, Azure DevOps, and Zoom/Teams meeting tools, giving Scrum teams auto-generated retros and velocity trends out of the box.
rationales.adoption: Nearly every tech organization running Scrum now uses AI-generated sprint reporting by default; adoption is close to universal in software teams.
rationales.agenticExposure: Metrics rollups and meeting-note summarization are fully agent-ownable today; team coaching, impediment removal requiring political capital, and building psychological safety are not.

tasksGrowing: Team coaching and psychological safety building
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1082 Project Management Specialists, p25-p75 rounded (no dedicated Scrum Master SOC code)
insight: Burndown charts and retro summaries are now fully automated from tool telemetry, and no one misses making them by hand. That leaves the Scrum Master's real job exposed: can they actually build a team's trust, mediate a conflict, and clear a political impediment? Those who only ran ceremonies are the most at risk.
